design_pillars: Gather, refine, and craft gear to survive biomes.
Scarce food, fuel, and durability pressure routes.
Day/night cycles force planning and shelter.
design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Survival Crafting through its signature loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Combat or challenge pacing should match genre tempo and readable feedback.
constraints: Signature mechanics must reinforce genre fantasy

gdd_outline.overview: Survival Crafting genre recipe anchored on crafting-economy-loop, resource-scarcity-management.

gdd_outline.progression_notes: Introduce one signature mechanic per teaching beat before combinations.

pacing.early: Teach crafting economy loop with low failure cost.
pacing.late: Test full signature loop mastery under peak constraints.
pacing.mid: Combine supporting mechanics and raise resource or pattern pressure.

variants.label: Hardcore Survival Crafting
variants.notes: Tighter economy and higher failure cost for experienced players.
